title: Claude Ecosystem Daily Watch — April 14 2026
summary: Major release day: Claude Code Desktop redesigned with parallel multi-session sidebar; Claude Code Routines (research preview) launched — scheduled automations run on Anthropic infra without local machine. Claude Code v2.1.108/2.1.109 ship 1-hour prompt caching TTL env var, recap feature, Skill tool built-in slash command discovery, and background plugin monitors. Model deprecation notice issued for claude-sonnet-4-20250514 and claude-opus-4-20250514 (retire June 15 2026). Message Batches API supports 300k output tokens for Opus/Sonnet 4.6. Claude Cowork reached GA (April 9).
features_covered: Claude Code Desktop Redesign — parallel multi-session sidebar, integrated terminal, file editing, HTML/PDF preview
Claude Code Routines (Research Preview) — scheduled/triggered automations on Anthropic infra
Claude Code v2.1.109 — extended-thinking progress indicator improvement
Claude Code v2.1.108 — ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H env var (API, Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry)
Claude Code v2.1.108 — recap feature on session resume
Claude Code v2.1.108 — Skill tool discovers/invokes built-in slash commands
Claude Code v2.1.108 — background plugin monitors via monitors manifest key
Model Deprecation — claude-sonnet-4-20250514 and claude-opus-4-20250514 retire June 15 2026
Message Batches API — 300k output tokens via output-300k-2026-03-24 beta header (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6)
Claude Cowork GA — enterprise management and monitoring tools
Claude Mythos — cybersecurity preview to 11 orgs
